overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy action RPG showing an armored character riding a horse through a foggy grassland. The scene features massive ancient stone viaducts and distant gothic cathedral ruins visible through thick mist, with the character carrying a lit torch while traversing tall grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy grassland with ancient stone viaduct

agents.ego_description: riding a horse through tall grass while carrying a lit torch, approaching spectral figures in the distance

evergreen trees dotting the right side of the landscape

large boulders and rock formations scattered in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character rides through a wide-open foggy grassland with dense tall grass swaying in the wind. A massive ancient stone viaduct dominates the background while gothic ruins pierce the mist in the distance. Spectral white figures appear ahead in the grass as the character approaches, carrying a torch to light the way through the hazy atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, fog-shrouded grassland that gradually reveals spectral inhabitants. It begins with the character riding through wide-open plains where dense tall grass sways in the wind under a heavy haze. As the camera advances, the oppressive mist begins to frame a massive ancient stone viaduct and distant gothic ruins piercing the horizon. The scene then shifts focus toward the immediate path as the character carries a lit torch to pierce the gloom, before finally encountering spectral white figures emerging from the grass ahead.
